<<THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS>>

THE MAXIMUM LIKELIHOOD ESTIMATORS FOR THE PARAMETERS ARE AS FOLLOWS:

THE MLE FOR MU_X IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR MU_Y IS [THE SAMPLE MEAN OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_X_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF X_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_Y_SQUARED IS [THE SAMPLE VARIANCE OF Y_i]

THE MLE FOR SIGMA_XY IS [THE COVARIANCE BETWEEN X_i AND Y_i]

<<THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE EFFECT OF THE DRUG>>

THE HYPOTHESIS TEST FOR THE EFFECT OF THE DRUG IS AS FOLLOWS:

THE NULL HYPOTHESIS IS [H_0: THE DRUG HAS NO EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]

THE ALTERNATIVE HYPOTHESIS IS [H_1: THE DRUG HAS A SIGNIFICANT EFFECT ON REDUCING BLOOD PRESSURE]

THE TEST STATISTIC IS [THE TEST STATISTIC FOR THE COVARIANCE]

THE REJECTION CRITERIA IS [THE REJECTION CRITERIA AT A SIGNIFICANCE LEVEL OF 0.05]

THE REJECTION REGION IS [THE REJECTION REGION FOR THE TEST STATISTIC]

THE P-VALUE IS [THE P-VALUE OF THE TEST STATISTIC]

THE REJECTION DECISION IS [THE REJECTION DECISION BASED ON THE P-VALUE]

<<THE RESULTS OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST>>

THE RESULTS OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST ARE [THE RESULTS OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST]

THE REJECTION DECISION IS [THE REJECTION DECISION BASED ON THE P-VALUE]

THE CONCLUSION IS [THE CONCLUSION OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST]

<<THE CONCLUSION OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST>>

THE CONCLUSION OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST IS [THE CONCLUSION OF THE HYPOTHESIS TEST]
